_README: Tier-2 mint targets: token_ref -> {url, extract, ttl_seconds, refresh_on, [wait_xhr], [settle_ms]}. This file holds only HOW to mint (urls + extract rules) — token VALUES are secrets kept in runs/tier2_tokens.json (gitignored). Copy to tier2_mint.json and VALIDATE each extract rule live before relying on it. Only add companies the exhaustion ladder proved exhausted.

fastenal._note: Akamai sensor cookie. VALIDATE: confirm the cookie name AND that the load-jobs POST accepts the replayed cookie (pair with an apicapture spec: token_ref=fastenal, token_inject={cookie:_abck}).

sempra_adp._note: ADP-RM myjobstoken. VALIDATE: the token may live in sessionStorage or only appear as an XHR header (use {xhr_header:{url_contains, header}} instead).
